urgent: Hi {name} — sorry for the urgent message.
Hi {name}, I need quick help with something time-sensitive.

polite: Thanks so much — I know you're busy.
Thank you in advance for any guidance.
warm: Thanks a lot, really appreciate it!
Thanks so much for your help!
urgent: Thank you — I'll watch for your reply.
Thanks for looking at this so quickly.

goal_starters: I want to figure out how to {goal}

answer: Do you know the answer to {detail}?
direction: Could you point me in the right direction for {detail}?
What would you suggest as a next step for {detail}?
review: Could you take a quick look at {detail}?
confirm: Am I on the right track with {detail}?
Could you confirm whether {detail} is correct?
recommend: Do you have a recommendation for {detail}?

timebox_phrases: This should only take about {min} minutes of your time.
I think a {min}-minute chat would cover it.
I estimate this would need {min} minutes at most.
exit_options: No worries if you're too busy — I can also try {alternative}.
If this isn't a good time, I totally understand.
Feel free to point me elsewhere if someone else is better suited.
If you don't have time, even a quick pointer would help.
